details.heading: Ships in product packaging
details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. Learn more

about_item: Small Dog Carrier Purse - This small size pet carrier is designed for most love pets that under 8 lbs, such as chihuahua, teddy and so on. Please make sure that the weight of your pets is suitable for this carrier purse

Airline Approved - 16.5*10.6*7.0 inches (L*H*W). With the airline-approved design, conforms to under-seat dimensions of most airlines, this pet carrier enable you take your love pets to the airplane or anywhere else, perfect for travel

Quality Material - Our soft-sided pet purse is made of high quality smooth PU leather. No fade, no distortion, breathable, lightweight, washable and softable. All zippers are made of high-grade alloys, sturdy, will not break after years use
Extra Large Pocket - Comes with 1 SUPER-LARGE capacity pocket , which can carry dog food, snacks, dog urine bags, water cup, keys, mobile phone, etc. You do not need yo carry extra purse
Breathable and Safe - 2 reinforced mesh on the side and the top has a zipper opening mesh ensure enough air circulation, the inner fixed dog leash can avoid the pets from running out

Comfortable and No-anxiety - The interior space of the bag is large enought and it do not deform or shrink, so your love pets won't feel crowded or anxious. The inner sturdy hard-sided construction pet cushion is soft and skin-friendly, make your pets feel warm and comfortable

looks nice, FOUL odor! i washed and soaked but still has a weird smell to it….

Perfect size for my pup and works great. The gold accents are yellow and look extremely cheap and gaudy. All of the zippers work great....

authors_reviews.title: Excellent Carrier
authors_reviews.text: Fabulous purse/dog carrier! We are thrilled with all the amenities of this carrier and are sure that our dog will be comfortable in it on the airplane as we travel with him often. The mesh is perfectly placed and the exterior definitely resembles a large, good-looking purse. We also like the large, spacious pocket on the front.We are very happy with the purchase.
authors_reviews.author: Minnesota Mike

authors_reviews.title: Great bag
authors_reviews.text: I Love this bag. Good quality and so cute. It's look like a regular purse. So discreet. People wouldn't think it a dog carrier bag. Its a good size for my 2.5 lb morkie. She likes it. She comfortable inside it. And doesn't mind being in it. I love that it has a large pocket. I can fit a leash, dog food, treats, dog wipes inside it. Also the flaps on the side is great. I can lift it up so my puppy can see out. Or close it making the purse even more discreet. Overall this is an amazing bag! So worth it.
authors_reviews.author: Tawana

authors_reviews.title: Cute
authors_reviews.text: So far so good. It’s a cute bag. Not sure how long the material will last. I would have paid more for real quality leather
authors_reviews.author: Nomadchic

authors_reviews.title: It's so lux people don't realize a dog is in there
authors_reviews.text: I purchased this for my new puppy Dream. Now at 2 years old she fills it out a bit more than she did as a puppy but still has plenty of room to move around, plus relax and sleep when she wants. It has the look of a luxury bag, and most people are shocked when Dream sticks her little head out!
authors_reviews.author: BrownGirlBella

authors_reviews.title: The Best, Most Gorgeous Dog Purse I've Ever Owned!!
authors_reviews.text: This bag is beautiful!! My dog loves it and I get compliments on it all the time. I did add a shoulder strap to it, which looks like it belongs on the bag. The shoulder strap was a very nice addition. I have used this on the plane several times and it fits perfectly under the seat in front of me. Unless you have the side flaps up, this simply looks like a classy purse. LOVE IT!!!
authors_reviews.author: Grozzie J

authors_reviews.title: Size is great but the gold accents are yellow and look very cheap
authors_reviews.text: Perfect size for my pup and works great. The gold accents are yellow and look extremely cheap and gaudy. All of the zippers work great. I will continue to use.
authors_reviews.author: Lauren Campbell

authors_reviews.title: Value looks great and does the trick!
authors_reviews.text: Great for small dog Ours is a 9 pound Chinese Crested
authors_reviews.author: Sheila Haas

authors_reviews.title: Super stylish
authors_reviews.text: Wasn’t sure if my lil Pom will like it and she loves being a pocketbook pup. Sturdy, and looks just like a luxury bag. She is 5 lbs and it fits her perfectly with toys inside.
authors_reviews.author: Nia

other_countries_reviews.title: AMAZING
other_countries_reviews.text: First off, the design is nothing short of amazing. It’s so fancy and well-made that it doesn’t even look like a typical dog bag. You could walk into a room with it, and no one would suspect you’re actually carrying your beloved pet inside. It’s the perfect blend of elegance and discretion.The comfort level of this bag, both for me and my dog, is unparalleled. The interior is spacious enough for my dog to fit comfortably, and it includes features that ensure the bag is breathable. This is particularly important for those long journeys or when we’re out on a warm day. My dog can see outside through the well-designed mesh areas, allowing them to enjoy the view and stay calm without drawing attention from people around us. It’s remarkable how they’ve managed to balance visibility for the dog while maintaining privacy.Traveling with my dog on planes used to be a stressful ordeal, but this bag has changed that. It’s compliant with airline regulations, making it a fantastic option for air travel. The peace of mind knowing that my dog is safe, comfortable, and right by my side is invaluable.
other_countries_reviews.author: Jade Gouin

other_countries_reviews.title: Super cute and my dog absolutely loves it
other_countries_reviews.text: Super cute and convenient! My dog absolutely loves her purse and I bring her everywhere in this!For driving I just hang the handles over the head rest and she is nice and secured.To say the least - she has 100% loved this purse to death in the last year and I will definitely be getting a new one!
other_countries_reviews.author: Jessi

other_countries_reviews.title: Deux dans un !
other_countries_reviews.text: Wow ! C’est un sac super beau, d’ailleurs j’ai reçu beaucoup de compliments.Il est bien fait et de belle apparence. Il me serre de sac à main avec la grande pochette sur le côté et de confort pour mon petit chien.Je le recommande à tous les petit chien. Bye-bye 👋 🐾
other_countries_reviews.author: Francine D

other_countries_reviews.title: Perfect
other_countries_reviews.text: This is perfect so far! The metal is extremely cheap and feels cheap as well but other then that perfect bag and she loves it!
other_countries_reviews.author: Krystal

other_countries_reviews.title: Très beau
other_countries_reviews.text: Très beau sac comme la photo
other_countries_reviews.author: Elizabeth Ducharme
